name: Gruvbox
description: Retro groove color scheme with warm earthy tones.

preview.sampleText: Retro groove with warm earthy tones and vintage aesthetics.

classes.th: border border-yellow-900 p-2 bg-yellow-900 font-semibold text-orange-300
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-orange-500 pl-4 italic my-4 text-yellow-200 bg-gray-800 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-gray-800 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-green-400
classes.pre: bg-gray-800 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-yellow-900
